item.title: The Olympic Breaking Situation is Insane
item.itunes:title: The Olympic Breaking Situation is Insane
item.itunes:author: 好機車
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tYVqlU0umKc Australian breakdancer Rachael Gunn, known by her stage name \"Raygun,\" faced significant backlash and criticism following her performance at the 2024 Paris Olympics. Her performance, which resulted in a score of zero points, sparked controversy and debate within the breaking community. Gunn's performance was widely mocked and criticized online, with many viewers questioning her qualifications and accusing her of \"mocking\" the sport. SOCIALS https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB 聯絡信箱: goodbikemob@gmail.com #raygun #olympicbreaking #rachelgunn #parisolympics

Her performance, which resulted in a score of zero points, sparked controversy and debate within the breaking community. Gunn's performance was widely mocked and criticized online, with many viewers questioning her qualifications and accusing her of \"mocking\" the sport. item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tYVqlU0umKc Australian breakdancer Rachael Gunn, known by her stage name \"Raygun,\" faced significant backlash and criticism following her performance at the 2024 Paris Olympics. Her performance, which resulted in a score of zero points, sparked controversy and debate within the breaking community. Gunn's performance was widely mocked and criticized online, with many viewers questioning her qualifications and accusing her of \"mocking\" the sport. item.title: TRUMP Will LOSE. Because of ONE Man. Also Polls Stuff.

item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Sx7N4FzenoE Is this the end of Trump? Find out what the SIenna New York Times Polls say and also we'll uncover the one man that is ruining Trump's presidential campaign and could cost him the White House. https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB 聯絡信箱: goodbikemob@gmail.com #kamalaharris #donaldtrumpnews #election2024

item.title: The END of Kamala Harris? #kamalaharris
item.itunes:title: The END of Kamala Harris? #kamalaharris
item.itunes:author: 好機車
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HkZ4vTDATOQ With 87 days left until the US presidential election, in today's video we'll look at major events from last week. One of these is the incident where current US Vice President Kamala Harris lost control and lashed out at voters in the swing state of Michigan. Another is the revelation by an influencer that Harris's team paid influencers to create videos attacking Trump. These two events have caused a significant public relations disaster. Most importantly, she has finally agreed to debate Trump. Today, we'll take a look at the exciting US presidential election! 00:00 Video starts 00:41 Influencers are avoiding her 05:42 Swing state incident 09:29 What are her policies? Sona English online course: https://hahow.in/courses/63abcd63770e61779597e6a6 Follow Sona: https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB Contact email: goodbikemob@gmail.com #kamalaharris #donaldtrumpnews #election2024 #kamalaharris #donaldtrumpnews #election2024
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HkZ4vTDATOQ With 87 days left until the US presidential election, in today's video we'll look at major events from last week. One of these is the incident where current US Vice President Kamala Harris lost control and lashed out at voters in the swing state of Michigan. Another is the revelation by an influencer that Harris's team paid influencers to create videos attacking Trump. These two events have caused a significant public relations disaster. Most importantly, she has finally agreed to debate Trump. Today, we'll take a look at the exciting US presidential election! 00:00 Video starts 00:41 Influencers are avoiding her 05:42 Swing state incident 09:29 What are her policies? item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HkZ4vTDATOQ With 87 days left until the US presidential election, in today's video we'll look at major events from last week. One of these is the incident where current US Vice President Kamala Harris lost control and lashed out at voters in the swing state of Michigan. Another is the revelation by an influencer that Harris's team paid influencers to create videos attacking Trump. These two events have caused a significant public relations disaster. Most importantly, she has finally agreed to debate Trump. Today, we'll take a look at the exciting US presidential election! 00:00 Video starts 00:41 Influencers are avoiding her 05:42 Swing state incident 09:29 What are her policies?
